title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: I was so tired that I fell asleep on the bus.
questions.afterGap: that I fell asleep on the bus.

questions.firstSentence: The report says that the government is planning to increase taxes.
questions.afterGap: , the government is planning to increase taxes.

questions.firstSentence: I have no idea how much the repair will cost.
questions.afterGap: how much the repair will cost.

questions.firstSentence: He was very upset when he lost his job.
She's always complaining about the weather.
The bridge was closed because it was unsafe.
